page.content: The first table, titled "Anti-proliferative functions of PXR," features a tissue specification column, a PXR activation approach column, and a references column. For colon cancer, ectopic expression of PXR significantly inhibited anchorage-independent growth and cell proliferation in vitro and xenograft tumor growth in vivo via G0/G1 cell-cycle arrest, as referenced by [50]. In liver and colon carcinogenic tissue, PXR overexpression sensitized cells to paraquat-induced oxidative stress when treated with PXR agonists, according to [51]. Additionally, for breast cancer, SXR activators inhibited cell proliferation and induced apoptosis in breast cancer cells, with wild-type p53 being mechanistically required for the anti-proliferative phenotype of PXR, as noted in reference [37]. The second table presents variables, P values, hazard ratios (HR*), and 95.0% confidence intervals (CI for HR). The variable Gender has a P value of 0.775, an HR of 1.098, and a 95.0% CI with a lower limit of 0.579 and an upper limit of 2.082. Age has a P value of 0.951, an HR of 1.019, with a 95.0% CI lower limit of 0.555 and upper limit of 1.873. Smoking History shows a P value of 0.273, HR of 0.681, with a 95.0% CI of 0.392 to 1.159.

column, and a references column. For colon cancer, ectopic expression of PXR significantly inhibited anchorage-independent
growth and cell proliferation in vitro and xenograft tumor growth in vivo via G0/G1 cell-cycle arrest, as referenced by [50]. In
liver and colon carcinogenic tissue, PXR overexpression sensitized cells to paraquat-induced oxidative stress when treated with
PXR agonists, according to [51]. Additionally, for breast cancer, SXR activators inhibited cell proliferation and induced
apoptosis in breast cancer cells, with wild-type p53 being mechanistically required for the anti-proliferative phenotype of PXR,
as noted in reference [37]. The second table presents variables, P values, hazard ratios (HR*), and 95.0% confidence intervals
(CI for HR). The variable Gender has a P value of 0.775, an HR of 1.098, and a 95.0% CI with a lower limit of 0.579 and an
upper limit of 2.082. Age has a P value of 0.951, an HR of 1.019, with a 95.0% CI lower limit of 0.555 and upper limit of 1.873.
Smoking History shows a P value of 0.273, HR of 0.681, with a 95.0% CI of 0.392 to 1.159.

cells.cell_text: Ectopic expression of PXR significantly inhibited anchorage-independent growth and cell proliferation in vitro and xenograft tumor growth in vivo via G0/G1 cell-cycle arrest.
PXR overexpression sensitized cells to paraquat-induced oxidative stress when treated with PXR agonists.
SXR activators inhibited cell proliferation and induced apoptosis in breast cancer cells. Wild-type p53 was mechanistically required for the anti-proliferative phenotype of PXR.

page.content: Histology has a P value of 0.387 and an HR of 1.499, with a CI from 0.599 to 3.749. Lymphatic Metastasis exhibits a P value of 0.388, HR of 1.405, with a CI ranging from 0.649 to 3.042. Metastasis Organ shows a P value of 0.734, HR of 0.894, within a CI of 0.469 to 1.706.
